title: Create Aeronautics Whitewall Tires
description: A fancy retexture of Create Aeronautics tires.
body:
# Wihtewall Tires

### Some stylish tire retexture for the Create Aeronautics mod.


I wish someone could make a mod that adds extra wheel types, that would be neat.


Also check out some of my builds at: [https://createmod.com/author/nobody](https://createmod.com/author/nobody)
